title: Full-Stack Developer
bio: I'm passionate about creating digital experiences that are not only visually appealing but also functional, accessible, and user-centered. I believe in the power of clean code and thoughtful design to solve real-world problems.
long_bio: With over 2 years of experience in web development and design, I've had the privilege of working with startups and established companies to bring their digital visions to life. My journey began with a curiosity about how websites work, and it has evolved into a passion for creating seamless, intuitive user experiences.
